::: {.flex .flex-col .gap-1}
# VentureLens {#venturelens .text-xl .sm:text-2xl .font-black}

## Analyze pitch decks like a VC, privately in 60 seconds {#analyze-pitch-decks-like-a-vc-privately-in-60-seconds .text-base .sm:text-lg .text-gray-600 .dark:text-gray-300}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.max-w-5xl .mx-auto .lg:flex .lg:gap-10 .px-4}
::: {.lg:flex-1 .min-w-0 .overflow-hidden}
::: {.mx-auto .flex .gap-2 .overflow-x-auto .scrollbar-hide .sm:p-2 .sm:border .border-gray-200 .dark:border-gray-700 .sm:rounded-xl .gap-[1px] .sm:gap-2 .max-w-full}

.overflow-hidden target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow"}

![VentureLens](https://resize.imagekit.co/lPq_YLulGgs00JG19biyVGpVrOECLW59BMbyOCQB3Sk/h:300/dpr:2/bg:ffffff/plain/s3://betalist-production/znwzrzk0cz75vmmoxy7yrwtyojzv){.inset-0
.w-full .h-full .object-cover
lazyload-src="https://resize.imagekit.co/lPq_YLulGgs00JG19biyVGpVrOECLW59BMbyOCQB3Sk/h:300/dpr:2/bg:ffffff/plain/s3://betalist-production/znwzrzk0cz75vmmoxy7yrwtyojzv"
lazyload-srcset="https://resize.imagekit.co/HJ1C_0_e3frPtxYT_g_3EtI78W1HEWMuCPOPZYU8tMM/h:300/dpr:1/bg:ffffff/plain/s3://betalist-production/znwzrzk0cz75vmmoxy7yrwtyojzv 1x, https://resize.imagekit.co/lPq_YLulGgs00JG19biyVGpVrOECLW59BMbyOCQB3Sk/h:300/dpr:2/bg:ffffff/plain/s3://betalist-production/znwzrzk0cz75vmmoxy7yrwtyojzv 2x, https://resize.imagekit.co/u4sKv9hpCVjtHCVtDvpnIsGMNnpY8tg8PNFz6S8jo4g/h:300/dpr:3/bg:ffffff/plain/s3://betalist-production/znwzrzk0cz75vmmoxy7yrwtyojzv 3x"}
:::
:::

::: {.text-lg .mt-8 .[&_p:not(:first-child)]:mt-4 .[&_strong]:font-bold}
VentureLens is an AI-powered pitch deck analysis tool that helps
founders and investors evaluate startup decks in seconds. Simply upload
a pitch deck and receive a structured, investor-style report
highlighting strengths, weaknesses, risks, and opportunities, just like
a VC would. Designed for speed and clarity, VentureLens turns hours of
manual review into a 60-second workflow.

Built with privacy in mind, VentureLens ensures your data stays secure
while delivering actionable insights you can actually use. Whether
you\'re a founder refining your pitch or an investor screening
opportunities, VentureLens helps you make smarter, faster decisions with
confidence.
:::
:::

::: {.mt-10 .lg:mt-0 .lg:w-72 .lg:shrink-0}
::: {.hidden .lg:flex .flex-col .gap-2 .mb-6}

.dark:bg-white .hover:bg-gray-800 .dark:hover:bg-gray-200 .text-white
.dark:text-black .text-lg .font-medium .rounded-lg .px-4 .py-3
target="_blank" turbo="false"}

::: {.section .border-t .border-gray-200 .dark:border-gray-700 .mt-10}
::: {.mx-auto .p-8 .pb-20}
### Discover startups similar to VentureLens {#discover-startups-similar-to-venturelens .text-xl .font-medium .text-center}

::: mt-6
::: {.dark:hover:bg-gray-800/50 .relative .isolate .-mx-2 .flex .items-stretch .gap-3 .px-4 .[--row-py:--spacing(5)] .hover:rounded-lg .hover:bg-gray-50 .lg:px-3 .lg:[--row-py:--spacing(3)] .startup-row}
[](/startups/evalyze){.absolute .inset-0}

::: {.flex .max-h-22 .shrink-0 .items-center}
::: {.dark:bg-black .dark:after:ring-white/20 .relative .size-8 .overflow-hidden .rounded-sm .bg-white .after:pointer-events-none .after:absolute .after:inset-0 .after:rounded-sm .after:ring-1 .after:ring-black/10 .after:ring-inset .sm:size-10}
![](https://resize.imagekit.co/DSNzpIaqsDMRoiabXqVmk4TZvBUqbENbfKxEW6OWgsU/s:40:40/dpr:2/plain/s3://betalist-production/535fl7ld1pdslkwtvus85wngz4m8){.block
.size-8 .sm:size-10 .object-contain}
:::
:::

::: {.dark:border-gray-800 .[.startup-row:first-child_&]:border-t-0 .[:not(.startup-row)+.startup-row_&]:border-t-0 .[.startup-row:hover_&]:border-transparent .[.startup-row:hover+.startup-row_&]:border-transparent .flex .min-w-0 .flex-1 .items-center .gap-3 .border-t .border-gray-100 .py-(--row-py)}
::: {.gap-0.5 .flex .min-w-0 .flex-1 .flex-col .lg:flex-row .lg:items-baseline .lg:gap-2}
